title: salix × relicta
intro: Salix × relicta, also known as the hybrid willow, is a natural hybrid plant derived from the crossing of the Salix purpurea and Salix viminalis species. The medicinal properties of Salix × relicta include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and lower blood pressure due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Salix × relicta are typically made into teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and treat various health issues.
